---
# ── SERIES ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Copy this into src/content/series/your-series-slug.mdx
# The file NAME is the slug posts reference. e.g. authentication.mdx → a post
# joins it with:  series: authentication
# The body below becomes the intro shown on the series landing page.

title: '' # ← series name                              (REQUIRED)
description: '' # ← one line describing the series           (REQUIRED, < 200)
tags: [Identity, Security] # ← optional topic tags
order: 100 # ← lower = appears earlier on /blog/series
upcoming: # ← OPTIONAL roadmap of parts not written yet (titles only).
  - 'Part you plan to write' #    Shown greyed on the landing page. Delete if unused.
published: true # ← false = hide the whole series
---

Write the series introduction here. Explain what the series covers, who it's for, and
how to approach it (read in order, or jump to a part). This text shows at the top of the
series landing page.

## To add a part to this series

In any blog post's frontmatter, add:

```
series: your-series-slug
seriesOrder: 1
```

`seriesOrder` sets the position (1, 2, 3 …). That's it — the post automatically appears
in this series, gets the in-post "Part X of N" box, and Prev/Next links.
